title: Brainstorm: learn from SillyTavern-style entry and power-user experience
description: Use Trellis to capture a product brainstorm for FableMap entry/onboarding, newcomer roleplay literacy, scene-setting prose, long opening-scene reading, NPC-hosted first minute, character-card compatibility, and progressive power-user tooling inspired by SillyTavern and related public docs.
next_action: Review visual evidence from child task with product owner.
Decide whether owner-curated scene_digest / first_scene_opener fields are worth a separate Schema/API task.
Decide whether to collapse non-selected NPC long openers behind a visitor-controlled branch.
Keep future ideas constrained by real-coordinate anchoring, owner sovereignty, and SillyTavern-compatible data export.
notes: Brainstorm plus first implementation child completed. Child 06-04-scene-setting-prose-mvp implemented frontend-only scene-setting prose, opening-scene reader, and in-character starter chips for native /tavern/:id plus legacy product panels; no Schema/API/database changes.
